case.title: HIGHWAY ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION CO. v. HILLSBOROUGH

opinion.h: HIGHWAY ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION CO. v. HILLSBOROUGH, 304 U.S. 560 (1938)
HIGHWAY ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, Inc., petitioner, v. HILLSBOROUGH COUNTY.* No. 858.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. George C. Bedell, of Jacksonville, Fla., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 304 U.S. 589, 58 S. Ct. 1037, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Highway Engineering & Construction Co v. Hillsborough 304 U.S. 560 (1938) ]
